summary: Frontend testing for Learn page - verified all 12 topic boxes, lucide-react icons (replaced emojis), Daily Learning Tip, How Can We Help section, Curated Bundles, mobile responsive, and Care page regression. All tests PASSED.

test_results.12_topic_boxes: PASSED - All 12 topics visible (Puppy Basics, Breed Guides, Food & Feeding, Grooming, Behavior, Training Basics, Travel with Dogs, Senior Dog Care, Health Basics, Rescue/Indie Care, Seasonal Care, New Pet Parent Guide)
test_results.topic_modal: PASSED - Clicking topic opens LearnTopicModal with tabs (Overview, Videos, Products, Services)
test_results.products_tab_in_modal: PASSED - Products tab shows training-related products (not cakes)
test_results.videos_tab: PASSED - Videos tab has curated content with Browse on YouTube button
test_results.daily_learning_tip: PASSED - TODAY'S LEARNING TIP banner visible with green gradient
test_results.how_can_we_help_icons: PASSED - 3 cards use lucide-react SVG icons (Award, PawPrint, Users) - NO emojis
test_results.products_section_icons: PASSED - Product category buttons use lucide-react SVG icons
test_results.services_section_icons: PASSED - Service cards use lucide-react icons (Target, Sparkles, Brain, PawPrint) - NO emojis
test_results.logged_in_learn_for_pet: PASSED - 'Learn for Mojo' section visible when logged in
test_results.logged_in_support_for_pet: CODE VERIFIED - SupportForPet.jsx uses lucide-react icons (Brain, Target, Sparkles, etc.)
test_results.logged_in_pet_daily_routine: CODE VERIFIED - PetDailyRoutine.jsx uses Sun, Cloud, Sunset, Moon icons - NO Edit Routine button exists
test_results.no_edit_routine_button: PASSED - 'Edit Routine' button REMOVED from PetDailyRoutine component (grep confirmed)
test_results.curated_bundles: PASSED - Shows 2 learn bundles (Puppy Starter Kit, Training Essentials Bundle) with beautiful dog images
test_results.care_page_regression: PASSED - /care loads without crash, 14,636 chars content, 23 bundles loaded
test_results.mobile_responsive: PASSED - 390px viewport renders cleanly with 2-column grid

code_review_verification.SupportForPet.jsx: Uses lucide-react icons: Brain, Target, Sparkles, Salad, Activity, Heart, PawPrint, Stethoscope, Dumbbell, Home, GraduationCap, HandHeart
code_review_verification.PetDailyRoutine.jsx: Uses lucide-react icons: Sun, Cloud, Sunset, Moon, ChevronRight, ShoppingBag
code_review_verification.LearnPage.jsx: Uses lucide-react icons: Award, PawPrint, Users for How Can We Help section - no emojis found

success_rate.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per request

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Learn page features verified working. Emojis replaced with lucide-react icons in How Can We Help, Services, SupportForPet, and PetDailyRoutine components. Edit Routine button successfully removed. Care page regression passed.
